name: rotary-encoder-ii-angle-bridge
description: Rotary Encoder II style hardware bridge with AS5600 angle sensor support for Volumio 4 (Bookworm)
author: OpenAI

volumio_info.details: Hardware bridge plugin with GUI for AS5600 angle readout and button actions (transport, volume, or custom callMethod).
volumio_info.changelog: 0.2.0: Added Rotary Encoder II style button layer and unified GUI with angle sensor support.
